sentences.target: Le chat guette sa proie près des buissons.
sentences.reading: /lə ʃa gɛt sa pʁwa pʁɛ de bɥisɔ̃/

translations.fr: Le chat guette sa proie près des buissons.
translations.ipa: /lə ʃa gɛt sa pʁwa pʁɛ de bɥisɔ̃/
translations.en: The cat watches for its prey near the bushes.
translations.es: El gato acecha a su presa cerca de los arbustos.
translations.de: Die Katze lauert in der Nähe der Büsche auf ihre Beute.
translations.it: Il gatto osserva la sua preda vicino ai cespugli.
translations.ko: 고양이가 덤불 근처에서 먹잇감을 노리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 猫在灌木丛旁边盯着猎物。
translations.yue: 貓喺灌木叢附近盯住獵物。
translations.ru: Кошка подстерегает свою добычу у кустов.
translations.pt: O gato espreita sua presa perto dos arbustos.
translations.vi: Con mèo rình mồi gần bụi cây.
translations.nl: De kat loert op zijn prooi bij de struiken.
translations.uk: Кішка підстерігає свою здобич біля кущів.
translations.hu: A macska a bokrok közelében lesi a zsákmányát.
translations.hi: बिल्ली झाड़ियों के पास अपने शिकार पर नज़र रख रही है.
translations.pl: Kot czai się na swoją zdobycz przy krzakach.
translations.el: Η γάτα παραμονεύει το θήραμά της κοντά στους θάμνους.
translations.nb: Katten ligger på lur ved buskene etter byttet sitt.
translations.id: Kucing mengintai mangsanya di dekat semak-semak.
translations.sv: Katten lurar på sitt byte vid buskarna.
translations.cs: Kočka číhá na svou kořist u keřů.
translations.da: Katten lurer på sit bytte ved buskene.
translations.ja: 猫は茂みのそばで獲物を狙っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introduces a specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses the action of watching/stalking.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person, agrees in gender/number with the noun (feminine singular ‘proie’).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition (as part of the complex preposition ‘près de’) introducing a locative complement.
Preposition ‘de’ contracted with the article ‘les’ (de + les); introduces the noun phrase after ‘près’.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Je suis la proie du stress au travail.
sentences.reading: /ʒə sɥi la pʁwa dy stʁɛs o tʁavaj/

translations.fr: Je suis la proie du stress au travail.
translations.ipa: /ʒə sɥi la pʁwa dy stʁɛs o tʁavaj/
translations.en: I am prey to stress at work.
translations.es: Soy presa del estrés en el trabajo.
translations.de: Ich bin bei der Arbeit dem Stress ausgeliefert.
translations.it: Sono preda dello stress al lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在工作中饱受压力折磨。
translations.yue: 我喺工作上飽受壓力折磨。
translations.pt: No trabalho, sou presa do estresse.
translations.vi: Tôi là nạn nhân của căng thẳng ở nơi làm việc.
translations.nl: Op het werk heb ik veel last van stress.
translations.uk: На роботі я потерпаю від стресу.
translations.hi: काम पर मैं तनाव का शिकार हूँ.
translations.el: Στη δουλειά είμαι θύμα του άγχους.
translations.nb: På jobb er jeg et offer for stress.
translations.id: Di tempat kerja, aku menjadi korban stres.
translations.sv: På jobbet är jag ett offer för stress.
translations.da: På arbejdet er jeg plaget af stress.
translations.ja: 職場ではストレスの餌食になっている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the predicate noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicate nominal (complement of the copula).
Preposition ‘de’ contracted with the article ‘le’ (de + le); introduces a genitive/complement (‘stress’).
Common noun; complement of ‘de’.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the article ‘le’ (à + le); introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Le faucon attrape sa proie dans le ciel.
sentences.reading: /lə fokɔ̃ atʁap sa pʁwa dɑ̃ lə sjɛl/

translations.fr: Le faucon attrape sa proie dans le ciel.
translations.ipa: /lə fokɔ̃ atʁap sa pʁwa dɑ̃ lə sjɛl/
translations.en: The falcon catches its prey in the sky.
translations.es: El halcón atrapa a su presa en el cielo.
translations.de: Der Falke fängt seine Beute in der Luft.
translations.it: Il falco cattura la sua preda in cielo.
translations.ru: Сокол ловит свою добычу в небе.
translations.pt: O falcão captura sua presa no céu.
translations.vi: Chim ưng bắt mồi trên không.
translations.nl: De valk vangt zijn prooi in de lucht.
translations.uk: Сокіл ловить свою здобич у небі.
translations.hu: A sólyom a levegőben kapja el a zsákmányát.
translations.hi: बाज़ आकाश में अपने शिकार को पकड़ता है.
translations.pl: Sokół chwyta swoją zdobycz w powietrzu.
translations.el: Το γεράκι πιάνει το θήραμά του στον ουρανό.
translations.nb: Falken fanger byttet sitt i luften.
translations.sv: Falken fångar sitt byte i luften.
translations.ro: Șoimul își prinde prada în aer.
translations.cs: Sokol chytá svou kořist ve vzduchu.
translations.da: Falken fanger sit bytte i luften.
translations.ja: ハヤブサは空中で獲物を捕らえる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses the action of catching.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person; agrees with feminine singular ‘proie’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun ‘ciel’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Les arnaqueurs cherchent une proie sur Internet.
sentences.reading: /lez aʁnakœʁ ʃɛʁʃ yn pʁwa syʁ ɛ̃tɛʁnɛt/

translations.fr: Les arnaqueurs cherchent une proie sur Internet.
translations.ipa: /lez aʁnakœʁ ʃɛʁʃ yn pʁwa syʁ ɛ̃tɛʁnɛt/
translations.es: Los estafadores buscan víctimas en Internet.
translations.de: Betrüger suchen im Internet nach Opfern.
translations.it: I truffatori cercano vittime su Internet.
translations.zh-Hans: 骗子在网上寻找受害者。
translations.vi: Kẻ lừa đảo tìm nạn nhân trên mạng.
translations.ar: المحتالون يبحثون عن ضحايا على الإنترنت.
translations.hi: ठग इंटरनेट पर शिकार ढूँढ़ते हैं.
translations.nb: Svindlere leter etter ofre på nettet.
translations.sv: Bedragare letar efter offer på nätet.
translations.da: Svindlere leder efter ofre på nettet.
translations.ja: 詐欺師はネットで被害者を探す。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; expresses the action of looking for.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb (figurative sense: target/victim).
Preposition introducing a locative medium (‘on the Internet’).
Proper noun; object of the preposition.
